title: MoreMushrooms
description: More Mushrooms is a 1.20.4 Fabric/Quilt mod to add more mushroom variants.
body:
# More Mushrooms ![Mushroom Catalog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CUDZDkYS/images/7f06fbacd15bd64df5e236f70321b97ddc15d933.png) More Mushrooms is a 1.20.4 Fabric/Quilt mod to add more mushroom variants. They are currently only spawning in the Dark Forest biome but this will change in the future. The current added mushrooms are:
• Inky Cap
• Wine Cap
• Blue Pinkgill
• Amethyst Deceiver
• Penny Bun
• Purple Brittlegill ### Mushroom Art Credit: https://pixerelia.itch.io/
